title: tengine.gpu.lease.granted v1
description: Emitted when a process acquires the exclusive GPU work-queue lease. Source: /tengine/gpu. The fencing_token is monotonic across grants and lets consumers reject stale heartbeats/results from a previously-evicted holder (fencing-token mutual exclusion). Pair with a later tengine.gpu.lease.released carrying the same fencing_token.

holder.description: Identity of the lease holder, source-URI style (e.g. 'tengine/interactive_pipeline_lab').

pid.description: OS process id of the holder; used by the reaper to detect crashed holders.

fencing_token.description: Monotonically increasing token assigned at grant time. Strictly greater than any previously granted token; consumers fence stale writers by comparing tokens.

pools.description: GPU memory pools claimed by this lease. Either a list of pool names, or a map of pool name to reserved megabytes.

vram_budget_mb.description: Total VRAM budget in megabytes the holder is permitted to use under this lease.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at which the lease was granted.
